root_text.an10.174:10.3: Iti kho, bhikkhave, lobho kammanidānasambhavo, doso kammanidānasambhavo, moho kammanidānasambhavo.
root_text.an10.174:10.4: Lobhakkhayā kammanidānasaṅkhayo, dosakkhayā kammanidānasaṅkhayo, mohakkhayā kammanidānasaṅkhayo”ti.

translation_text.an10.174:1.1: “Mendicants, I say that killing living creatures is threefold:
translation_text.an10.174:1.2: caused by greed, hate, or delusion.
translation_text.an10.174:2.1: I say that stealing is threefold:
translation_text.an10.174:2.2: caused by greed, hate, or delusion.
translation_text.an10.174:3.1: I say that sexual misconduct is threefold:
translation_text.an10.174:3.2: caused by greed, hate, or delusion.
translation_text.an10.174:4.1: I say that lying is threefold:
translation_text.an10.174:4.2: caused by greed, hate, or delusion.
translation_text.an10.174:5.1: I say that divisive speech is threefold:
translation_text.an10.174:5.2: caused by greed, hate, or delusion.
translation_text.an10.174:6.1: I say that harsh speech is threefold:
translation_text.an10.174:6.2: caused by greed, hate, or delusion.
translation_text.an10.174:7.1: I say that talking nonsense is threefold:
translation_text.an10.174:7.2: caused by greed, hate, or delusion.
translation_text.an10.174:8.1: I say that covetousness is threefold:
translation_text.an10.174:8.2: caused by greed, hate, or delusion.
translation_text.an10.174:9.1: I say that ill will is threefold:
translation_text.an10.174:9.2: caused by greed, hate, or delusion.
translation_text.an10.174:10.1: I say that wrong view is threefold:
translation_text.an10.174:10.2: caused by greed, hate, or delusion.
translation_text.an10.174:10.3: And so greed, hate, and delusion are sources and origins for deeds.
translation_text.an10.174:10.4: With the ending of greed, hate, and delusion, the sources of deeds are ended.”
